SEARCH
Package grafioschtrader.connector.instrument.generic

Class GenericFeedConnector

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.connector.instrument.BaseFeedConnector
grafioschtrader.connector.instrument.generic.GenericFeedConnector
All Implemented Interfaces:
IFeedConnector
public class GenericFeedConnector extends BaseFeedConnector
A feed connector that is configured entirely from a GenericConnectorDef database entity rather than from code. Supports JSON, CSV, and HTML (JSoup) response formats for both historical and intraday data, for securities and currency pairs. Not a Spring @Component; instances are created dynamically by GenericFeedConnectorFactory.

  • Constructor Details

    • GenericFeedConnector

      public GenericFeedConnector(GenericConnectorDef connectorDef, String apiKey)

  • Method Details

    • isActivated

      public boolean isActivated()
      Description copied from interface: IFeedConnector
      Indicates whether this connector is currently activated and available for use. Connectors may be deactivated due to missing API keys or configuration issues.
      Specified by:
      isActivated in interface IFeedConnector
      Overrides:
      isActivated in class BaseFeedConnector
      Returns:
      true if the connector is activated, false otherwise

    • needHistoricalGapFiller

      public boolean needHistoricalGapFiller(Security security)
      Description copied from interface: IFeedConnector
      Indicates whether this connector requires gap filling for historical data. Some connectors only provide end-of-day prices when actual trading occurred, requiring gaps to be filled with previous closing prices.
      Specified by:
      needHistoricalGapFiller in interface IFeedConnector
      Overrides:
      needHistoricalGapFiller in class BaseFeedConnector
      Parameters:
      security - the security to check
      Returns:
      true if gap filling is needed, false otherwise

    • getIntradayDelayedSeconds

      public int getIntradayDelayedSeconds()
      Description copied from interface: IFeedConnector
      Returns the delay in seconds for intraday data provided by this connector. Real-time data has 0 delay, while delayed feeds may have 15-20 minute delays.
      Specified by:
      getIntradayDelayedSeconds in interface IFeedConnector
      Overrides:
      getIntradayDelayedSeconds in class BaseFeedConnector
      Returns:
      delay in seconds for intraday data

    • getDescription

      public IFeedConnector.Description getDescription()
      Description copied from class: BaseFeedConnector
      Loads and returns localized description text for this connector. Attempts to load description from HTML files in the classpath under i18n/ directory. First tries language-specific file, then falls back to default. Supports section markers [historical] and [intra] to separate content.
      Specified by:
      getDescription in interface IFeedConnector
      Overrides:
      getDescription in class BaseFeedConnector
      Returns:
      Description object containing localized help text

    • hideApiKeyForError

      public String hideApiKeyForError(String url)
      Description copied from class: BaseFeedConnector
      Hides sensitive information (like API keys) from URLs before displaying in error messages. The base implementation returns the URL unchanged. Subclasses with API keys should override.
      Overrides:
      hideApiKeyForError in class BaseFeedConnector
      Parameters:
      url - the URL that may contain sensitive information
      Returns:
      the URL with sensitive information hidden

    • isDownloadLinkCreatedLazy

      public EnumSet<IFeedConnector.DownloadLink> isDownloadLinkCreatedLazy()
      Description copied from interface: IFeedConnector
      Returns which data provider the content of the links for the frontend must be created in the backend. Normally, the frontend receives a URL that can be opened directly in the browser. This is not possible for data providers with API keys, so the data content is prepared in the backend. There are other cases where the data content must be created in the backend.
      Specified by:
      isDownloadLinkCreatedLazy in interface IFeedConnector
      Overrides:
      isDownloadLinkCreatedLazy in class BaseFeedConnector
      Returns:
      set of download link types requiring special handling

    • getContentOfPageRequest

      public String getContentOfPageRequest(String httpPageUrl)
      Description copied from class: BaseFeedConnector
      Retrieves the content of a web page for display in the frontend. Used when the frontend needs to show raw data provider content. Returns "Failure!" if the request fails.
      Specified by:
      getContentOfPageRequest in interface IFeedConnector
      Overrides:
      getContentOfPageRequest in class BaseFeedConnector
      Parameters:
      httpPageUrl - the URL to fetch content from
      Returns:
      the page content as a string, or "Failure!" if the request fails

    • getEodSecurityHistory

      public List<Historyquote> getEodSecurityHistory(Security security, LocalDate from, LocalDate to) throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: IFeedConnector
      Retrieves historical end-of-day price quotes for a security within the specified date range. The returned list should be sorted in ascending order by date.
      Specified by:
      getEodSecurityHistory in interface IFeedConnector
      Overrides:
      getEodSecurityHistory in class BaseFeedConnector
      Parameters:
      security - the security for which to retrieve historical data
      from - the start date (inclusive) for the historical data range
      to - the end date (inclusive) for the historical data range
      Returns:
      list of historical quotes sorted by date
      Throws:
      Exception - if data retrieval fails due to connectivity, authentication, or parsing errors

    • getEodCurrencyHistory

      public List<Historyquote> getEodCurrencyHistory(Currencypair currencyPair, LocalDate from, LocalDate to) throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: IFeedConnector
      Retrieves historical exchange rate data for a currency pair within the specified date range.
      Specified by:
      getEodCurrencyHistory in interface IFeedConnector
      Overrides:
      getEodCurrencyHistory in class BaseFeedConnector
      Parameters:
      currencyPair - the currency pair for which to retrieve historical exchange rates
      from - the start date (inclusive) for the historical data range
      to - the end date (inclusive) for the historical data range
      Returns:
      list of historical exchange rate quotes sorted by date
      Throws:
      Exception - if data retrieval fails

      public String getSecurityHistoricalDownloadLink(Security security)
      Description copied from interface: IFeedConnector
      Generates the download URL for accessing historical price data of a security. This URL may be displayed to users or used for direct data retrieval.
      Specified by:
      getSecurityHistoricalDownloadLink in interface IFeedConnector
      Overrides:
      getSecurityHistoricalDownloadLink in class BaseFeedConnector
      Parameters:
      security - the security for which to generate the download link
      Returns:
      the historical data download URL, or null if not supported

      public String getCurrencypairHistoricalDownloadLink(Currencypair currencypair)
      Description copied from interface: IFeedConnector
      Generates the download URL for accessing historical currency pair exchange rate data. This URL may be used in frontend applications to verify connector configuration.
      Specified by:
      getCurrencypairHistoricalDownloadLink in interface IFeedConnector
      Overrides:
      getCurrencypairHistoricalDownloadLink in class BaseFeedConnector
      Parameters:
      currencypair - the currency pair for which to generate the download link
      Returns:
      the historical currency data download URL, or null if not supported

      Overrides:

      Parameters:

      Throws:

      Generates the download URL for accessing intraday price data of a security.

      public String getCurrencypairIntradayDownloadLink(Currencypair currencypair)
      Description copied from interface: IFeedConnector
      Generates the download URL for accessing intraday currency pair exchange rate data.
      Specified by:
      getCurrencypairIntradayDownloadLink in interface IFeedConnector
      Overrides:

      Parameters:
      currencypair - the currency pair for which to generate the download link
      Returns:
      the intraday currency data download URL, or null if not supported

    • testEndpoint

      public GenericConnectorTestResult testEndpoint(String feedSupport, String instrumentType, String ticker, LocalDate fromDate, LocalDate toDate, String fromCurrency, String toCurrency)
      Tests a single endpoint by performing one HTTP request, parsing the response, and returning the result without any side effects (no pagination, no EndpointOption post-processing, no marking endpoint as used). The caller is responsible for building the ticker string (including CURRENCY_PAIR composition).
      Parameters:
      feedSupport - "FS_HISTORY" or "FS_INTRA"
      instrumentType - "SECURITY" or "CURRENCY"
      ticker - pre-built ticker string
      fromDate - start date for FS_HISTORY (ignored for FS_INTRA)
      toDate - end date for FS_HISTORY (ignored for FS_INTRA)
      Returns:
      test result with request URL, HTTP status, raw response, parsed data, and timing

    • getConnectorDef

      public GenericConnectorDef getConnectorDef()

    • setApiKey

      public void setApiKey(String apiKey)
